The 'build' function reduces an array of command objects into a single string, employing 'handleCommand' for each. The code does not perform any I/O operations, network requests, or system modifications. It appears to be a standard utility for SVG path string creation, with no signs of malicious behavior, backdoors, or malicious data handling.
